name: ContinuousHip Twists
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Continuous Hip Twists, Natural Top, Rope Spinning, Three Alemanas, Three Threes
following_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twists, Continuous Hip Twists, Circular Hip Twists, Rope Spinning

steps.action: Diagonal back with partial weight, body completes turn to L
comments: At end of previous beat, extend L arm slightly fwd at normal level and retain tone in arms

steps.action: Transfer weight to LF, slight body turn to R
Step forward in line with LF towards Lady's right side, 1/4 turn to R, body turns slightly more
Forward and across, 3/8 to R, turn initiated from hips, hips turn more than upper body
Forward and across towards Man's right side, 3/8 to L, turn initiated from hips, hips turn more than upper body
Forward in line with RF, then turn to end side and slightly forward, 1/8 to R then further 1/4 to R
comments: Turn to end side and slightly fwd
